name: East Texas Pecan Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Set out butter to soften.
2. Sift together flour, salt, and baking powder.
3. Grease the bottom of a 10-inch tube pan.
4. Separate the eggs; beat the yolks well.
5. Beat egg whites until stiff.
6. In a large mixing bowl, cream together the butter and brown sugar.
7. Add the beaten egg yolks, mixing well.
8. Combine milk, vanilla, and coffee dissolved in 3 tablespoons hot water.
9. Add the dry ingredients alternately with the liquid mixture.
10. Fold in the pecans and egg whites.
11. Pour the batter into the prepared pan.
12. Bake at 325 degrees Fahrenheit for 1-1/2 hours.
13. Let cool in the pan on a cake rack.
14. Remove from the pan.
Serves 12.
